name: Tego Cyber, Inc.
business: Tego Cyber Inc. develops and commercializes cybersecurity solutions for threat intelligence and autonomous threat hunting/correlation. Its products include a curated threat intelligence feed and a threat correlation engine that integrates with existing SIEM and data lake platforms such as Splunk, Elastic, and Amazon Security Lake, targeting enterprise security teams.

exposures.sentence: The company is focused on developing solutions for threat intelligence and autonomous threat hunting/correlation.

catalysts.event: Release of threat correlation integration for Databricks
catalysts.sentence: A threat correlation integration for Databricks is currently under development with expected release in early 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Global cybersecurity market projected to grow from $173 billion in 2020 to $270 billion by 2026 at an 8% CAGR (Gartner).
tamClaims.sentence: Projections have this market growing at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8% from $173 billion in 2020 to $270 billion by 2026 (Gartner).

tamClaims.claim: Cyber threat intelligence segment valued at $5.3 billion in 2018, projected to grow at 19.7% CAGR to $12.9 billion by 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: The cyber threat intelligence segment of the overall cybersecurity market is estimated to be currently valued at $5.3 billion in 2018 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 19.7% to reach $12.9 billion by 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Global cost of cybercrime expected to reach $5 trillion by 2024 (Juniper Research).
tamClaims.sentence: A Juniper Research report on cybercrime from 2019, suggests that the cost of such malicious attacks will rise to US$5 trillion by 2024.
